intro.title: Put your brand *where the builders are.*
intro.body:
Ummah Tech is a South African non-profit initiative that brings together Muslim founders, technologists, entrepreneurs, researchers and creatives committed to building technology with faith, purpose and long-term responsibility at its centre.

Partnership places your organisation inside that network.

items.title: Reach a network of tech leaders
items.body: Visibility among Muslim technologists, entrepreneurs, developers and innovators shaping the future of technology.

items.title: Align with Islamic values
items.body: Align your intention to please Allah (swt) with a commitment to ethical innovation and socially responsible technology.

items.title: Showcase your brand
items.body: A direct line to an engaged audience of professionals, entrepreneurs and decision-makers across the tech industry.

items.title: Grow the community
items.body: Help build a space where Muslim professionals can collaborate and innovate solutions that serve the Ummah and society.

partners.heading: Our 2026 partners
partners.description: The organisations partnering with Ummah Tech 2026, at every tier.

tiers.heading: Partnership tiers
tiers.lead: Three tiers, scaled by prominence. Each includes everything in the tier below it, and complimentary tickets come with all three.

contact.heading: Start the conversation.
contact.description: Tell us who you are and what you have in mind, and we'll come back with the prospectus and a proposal shaped around it.
contact.successMessage: Thanks — we've got your message and we'll come back to you with the prospectus.
